tools.name: parse_quote
tools.description: Analyze an auto repair / mechanic shop quote or invoice. Extracts shop name, shop type (dealer/independent/chain), total price, labor rate, labor hours, parts vs labor breakdown, vehicle (year/make/model + mileage), individual repair line items with urgency ranking (critical/soon/can_wait/maintenance), parts type (OEM/aftermarket/reman), and possible upsells. Detects red flags like inflated labor hours vs Mitchell/AllData book time, suspicious 'while you're here' add-ons, missing parts warranty disclosure, and dealer-only-required repairs that an independent can do.

quote_text.description: The full text of the auto repair quote/invoice. Optional if quote_images is provided.

quote_images.description: Up to 3 base64-encoded image data URLs of the quote.

tools.name: check_errors
tools.description: Audit an auto repair quote and return ranked findings: red flags from the analyzer, scope/transparency gaps, urgency-mismatch (critical-vs-can-wait), and possible upsells. Useful when the user wants the issue list without re-extracting structured data.

parsed_quote.description: Previously-parsed auto repair quote object from parse_quote.

tools.name: lookup_average_price
tools.description: Look up typical hourly labor rates for auto repair shops by shop type (dealer, independent, chain) and state. Useful for benchmarking the labor rate on a specific quote against the market. Dealerships are typically 30-50% more per hour than independents but may be required for warranty work.

shop_type.description: Type of repair shop. 'independent' = mom-and-pop, 'chain' = Midas/Firestone/Pep Boys, 'dealer' = OEM dealership.

tools.name: draft_dispute
tools.description: Draft a written dispute letter to an auto repair shop or dealer. Tailored to common auto repair disputes: inflated labor hours, unauthorized work, diagnostic fee not credited, parts type mismatch (OEM billed but aftermarket installed), Magnuson-Moss warranty issues (manufacturer voiding warranty over aftermarket parts), recall/TSB work charged when it should be free, and general shop billing concerns.

issue_detail.description: Brief description of the specific issue

tools.name: negotiation_script
tools.description: Generate a phone or in-person negotiation script for an auto repair conversation. Tailored to common scenarios: leveraging a second-opinion quote, negotiating after the diagnostic, requesting independent shop alternative to dealer-only quote, asking for OEM part coverage, and disputing inflated labor hours. Includes opening, asks, common pushbacks, closing.
